main.name: Felothar the Steadfast
main.oracle_text:
Each creature you control assigns combat damage equal to its toughness rather than its power.
Creatures you control can attack as though they didn't have defender.
{3}, {T}, Sacrifice another creature: Draw cards equal to the sacrificed creature's toughness, then discard cards equal to its power.

card.name: Karametra, God of Harvests
card.oracle_text:
Indestructible
As long as your devotion to green and white is less than seven, Karametra isn't a creature.
Whenever you cast a creature spell, you may search your library for a Forest or Plains card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Sol Ring
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.
card.flavor_text:
"Model? I'm insulted. It's by all reasonable metrics a fully functional planetary system, scaled down for easier study."
—Urza, to Tawnos

card.name: Bloodletter of Aclazotz
card.oracle_text:
Flying
If an opponent would lose life during your turn, they lose twice that much life instead. (Damage causes loss of life.)
card.flavor_text: Its very presence rips old wounds open to bleed anew.

card.name: Smile at Death
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of your upkeep, return up to two target creature cards with power 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Put a +1/+1 counter on each of those creatures.

card.name: Eerie Ultimatum
card.oracle_text: Return any number of permanent cards with different names from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Great Forest Druid
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color.
card.flavor_text: "Forget the elves, that meddling faerie queen, and those greasy machines. If you ask me, it's the generous who should be remembered."

card.name: Doran, Besieged by Time
card.oracle_text:
Each creature spell you cast with toughness greater than its power costs {1} less to cast.
Whenever a creature you control attacks or blocks, it gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the difference between its power and toughness.

card.name: Brave the Sands
card.oracle_text:
Creatures you control have vigilance.
Each creature you control can block an additional creature each combat.
card.flavor_text: Enduring the most desolate and dangerous conditions, Abzan sentries unfailingly guard the stronghold gates.

card.name: Angelic Chorus
card.oracle_text: Whenever a creature you control enters, you gain life equal to its toughness.
card.flavor_text: The harmony of the glorious is a dirge to the wicked.

card.name: Marsh Flats
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Plains or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Verdant Catacombs
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Swamp or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Seedborn Muse
card.oracle_text: Untap all permanents you control during each other player's untap step.
card.flavor_text:
"Her voice is the wilderness, savage and pure."
—Kamahl, druid acolyte

card.name: Wall of Shards
card.oracle_text:
Defender, flying
Cumulative upkeep—An opponent gains 1 life. (At the beginning of your upkeep, put an age counter on this permanent, then sacrifice it unless you pay its upkeep cost for each age counter on it.)

card.name: Indatha Triome
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {W}, {B}, or {G}.)
This land enters tapped.
Cycling {3} ({3}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Nethroi, Apex of Death
card.oracle_text:
Mutate {4}{G/W}{B}{B} (If you cast this spell for its mutate cost, put it over or under target non-Human creature you own. They mutate into the creature on top plus all abilities from under it.)
Deathtouch, lifelink
Whenever this creature mutates, return any number of target creature cards with total power 10 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Shield Sphere
card.oracle_text:
Defender
Whenever this creature blocks, put a -0/-1 counter on it.
card.flavor_text:
"My Soldiers know that they need never fear for their protection."
—King Darien of Kjeldor

card.name: Three Visits
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a Forest card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text:
"Trying to meet a worthy man in the wrong way is as bad as closing the door on an invited guest."
—Mencius, a Chinese philosopher

card.name: Traproot Kami
card.oracle_text:
Defender; reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.)
Traproot Kami's toughness is equal to the number of Forests on the battlefield.

card.name: Windswept Heath
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Forest or Plains card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Where dragons once roared, their bones now keen.

card.name: Wave of Reckoning
card.oracle_text: Each creature deals damage to itself equal to its power.
card.flavor_text: We shall suffer turmoil equal to that which we have wrought, whether in this life or the next.

card.name: Undergrowth Stadium
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Vault of Champions
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Bountiful Promenade
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: Akroma's Will
card.oracle_text:
Choose one. If you control a commander as you cast this spell, you may choose both instead.
• Creatures you control gain flying, vigilance, and double strike until end of turn.
• Creatures you control gain lifelink, indestructible, and protection from each color until end of turn.

card.name: Sapling of Colfenor
card.oracle_text:
Indestructible
Whenever Sapling of Colfenor attacks, reveal the top card of your library. If it's a creature card, you gain life equal to that card's toughness, lose life equal to its power, then put it into your hand.
card.flavor_text: Her plans may yet bear fruit.

card.name: Nature's Lore
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a Forest card, put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: "Greetings, tired traveler."

card.name: Aura Shards
card.oracle_text: Whenever a creature you control enters, you may destroy target artifact or enchantment.
card.flavor_text: Gaea forged her soldiers into self-wielding weapons that struck down all impurities.

card.name: Bloom Tender
card.oracle_text: Vivid — {T}: For each color among permanents you control, add one mana of that color.
card.flavor_text: Beauty is a seed, waiting to blossom under her capable hands.

card.name: Ohran Frostfang
card.oracle_text:
Attacking creatures you control have deathtouch.
Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.
card.flavor_text: Even the smallest drop of its deadly venom will subtract decades from your lifespan.

card.name: The Meathook Massacre
card.oracle_text:
When The Meathook Massacre enters, each creature gets -X/-X until end of turn.
Whenever a creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life.
Whenever a creature an opponent controls dies, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Godless Shrine
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {W} or {B}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Overgrown Tomb
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {B} or {G}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Temple Garden
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {G} or {W}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

{T}: Add {G}.
Channel — {1}{G}, Discard this card: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or nonbasic land an opponent controls. That player may search their library for a land card with a basic land type, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each legendary creature you control.

card.name: Doran, the Siege Tower
card.oracle_text: Each creature assigns combat damage equal to its toughness rather than its power.
card.flavor_text: "Each year that passes rings you inwardly with memory and might. Wield your heart, and the world will tremble."

card.name: Wall of Omens
card.oracle_text:
Defender
When this creature enters, draw a card.
card.flavor_text:
"What will be has always been."
—Wall inscription

card.name: Murmuring Bosk

({T}: Add {G}.)
As this land enters, you may reveal a Treefolk card from your hand. If you don't, this land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}. This land deals 1 damage to you.

card.name: The Peregrine Dynamo
card.oracle_text:
Haste
{1}, {T}: Copy target activated or triggered ability you control from another legendary source that's not a commander. You may choose new targets for the copy. (Mana abilities can't be targeted.)

card.name: Birds of Paradise
card.oracle_text:
Flying
{T}: Add one mana of any color.
card.flavor_text: Its brilliant plumage painted streaks of color across a sky long darkened by war.

card.name: Zopandrel, Hunger Dominus
card.oracle_text:
Reach
At the beginning of each combat, double the power and toughness of each creature you control until end of turn.
{G/P}{G/P}, Sacrifice two other creatures: Put an indestructible counter on Zopandrel. ({G/P} can be paid with either {G} or 2 life.)

card.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
card.name: Delighted Halfling
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a legendary spell, and that spell can't be countered.

card.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
card.name: Last March of the Ents
card.oracle_text:
This spell can't be countered.
Draw cards equal to the greatest toughness among creatures you control, then put any number of creature cards from your hand onto the battlefield.
card.flavor_text:
"To Isengard with doom we come!
With doom we come, with doom we come!"

card.name: Urborg, Tomb of Yawgmoth
card.oracle_text: Each land is a Swamp in addition to its other land types.
card.flavor_text:
"All dead, all rotten. Elves and Men and Orcs. There was a great battle here long ago, yes."
—Gollum

card.name: Cabal Coffers
card.oracle_text: {2}, {T}: Add {B} for each Swamp you control.
card.flavor_text:
"Evil things came forth, and they took Minas Ithil and abode in it, and they made it into a place of dread; it is now called Minas Morgul, the Tower of Sorcery."
—Elrond

card.name: Reflecting Pool
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any type that a land you control could produce.
card.flavor_text:
"This is the Window of the Sunset, fairest of all the falls of Ithilien, land of many fountains."
—Faramir

card.name: Crashing Drawbridge
card.oracle_text:
Defender
{T}: Creatures you control gain haste until end of turn.
card.flavor_text:
"The Northern Beacon flared, and even before the drawbridge finished its descent, the knights charged out."
—*Legend of the Gilded Knights*

card.name: Command Tower
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text:
"New Vegas is more than a city—it's the remedy to mankind's derailment."
—Mr. House

({T}: Add {G} or {W}.)

card.name: Archdruid's Charm
card.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Search your library for a creature or land card and reveal it. Put it onto the battlefield tapped if it's a land card. Otherwise, put it into your hand. Then shuffle.
• Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.
• Exile target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Anguished Unmaking
card.oracle_text: Exile target nonland permanent. You lose 3 life.
card.flavor_text: Somber Day in Omenport as Another Hero Laid to Rest

card.name: Vault of the Archangel
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}{W}{B}, {T}: Creatures you control gain deathtouch and lifelink until end of turn.
card.flavor_text:
"For centuries my creation kept this world in balance. Now only her shadow remains."
—Sorin Markov

card.name: Flare of Fortitude
card.oracle_text:
You may sacrifice a nontoken white creature rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
Until end of turn, your life total can't change, and permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible.

card.name: Yavimaya, Cradle of Growth
card.oracle_text: Each land is a Forest in addition to its other land types.
card.flavor_text:
"Multani's heart is a seed, and all of Yavimaya is its flower. There is as much life here as in the rest of Dominaria together."
—Karn

card.name: Assassin's Trophy
card.oracle_text: Destroy target permanent an opponent controls. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text:
"A merry life and a short one, as promised. How well I know myself."
—Bartholomew "Black Bart" Roberts

card.name: Dawn's Truce
card.oracle_text:
Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they draw a card before its other effects.)
You and permanents you control gain hexproof until end of turn. If the gift was promised, permanents you control also gain indestructible until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: "I have a child I want to return to as well," whispered Mabel.

card.name: Fecund Greenshell
card.oracle_text:
Reach
As long as you control ten or more lands, creatures you control get +2/+2.
Whenever this creature or another creature you control with toughness greater than its power enters, look at the top card of your library. If it's a land card, you may put it onto the battlefield tapped. Otherwise, put it into your hand.

card.name: Faeburrow Elder
card.oracle_text:
Vigilance
This creature gets +1/+1 for each color among permanents you control.
{T}: For each color among permanents you control, add one mana of that color.
card.flavor_text: Its wide-reaching roots draw more than water.

card.name: Spidersilk Armor
card.oracle_text: Creatures you control get +0/+1 and have reach. (They can block creatures with flying.)
card.flavor_text: It hardly weighs anything, but it takes all day to remove.

card.name: Wall of Mulch
card.oracle_text:
Defender (This creature can't attack.)
{G}, Sacrifice a Wall: Draw a card.
card.flavor_text: Mulch is the fabric of life in the forest. Plants live in it, they die in it, and then they become part of it, feeding countless generations to come.

card.name: Hushwood Verge
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {G}.
{T}: Add {W}. Activate only if you control a Forest or a Plains.
card.flavor_text: Here, the Hauntwoods churn like a viper's nest, as monstrous creatures prowl hungrily toward the ghostly light.

card.name: Crystal Barricade
card.oracle_text:
Defender (This creature can't attack.)
You have hexproof. (You can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.)
Prevent all noncombat damage that would be dealt to other creatures you control.
card.flavor_text: Ikoria's crystals glow in the presence of monsters, making them valuable as both defensive fortifications and warning beacons.

card.name: Valkyrie's Call
card.oracle_text: Whenever a nontoken, non-Angel creature you control dies, return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it. It has flying and is an Angel in addition to its other types.
card.flavor_text: Every warrior on Kaldheim aspires to a death so noble.

card.name: Wastewood Verge
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {G}.
{T}: Add {B}. Activate only if you control a Swamp or a Forest.
card.flavor_text:
"I'm worried about Loot. He has great power but lacks the experience to know what dangers await him."
—Vraska

card.name: Bleachbone Verge
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {B}.
{T}: Add {W}. Activate only if you control a Plains or a Swamp.

card.name: Voice of Victory
card.oracle_text:
Mobilize 2 (Whenever this creature attacks, create two tapped and attacking 1/1 red Warrior creature tokens. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step.)
Your opponents can't cast spells during your turn.

card.name: Betor, Kin to All
card.oracle_text:
Flying
At the beginning of your end step, if creatures you control have total toughness 10 or greater, draw a card. Then if creatures you control have total toughness 20 or greater, untap each creature you control. Then if creatures you control have total toughness 40 or greater, each opponent loses half their life, rounded up.

card.name: Reunion of the House
card.oracle_text: Return any number of target creature cards with total power 10 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Exile Reunion of the House.
card.flavor_text:
"We stand or fall as a family. All of us."
—Betor

card.name: Jaws of Defeat
card.oracle_text: Whenever a creature you control enters, target opponent loses life equal to the difference between that creature's power and its toughness.
card.flavor_text:
"The Jeskai like talking about their Way? Let's see them talk their way out of this dilemma."
—Girdah, Abzan beastrider

card.name: Behind the Scenes
card.oracle_text:
Creatures you control have skulk. (They can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.)
{4}{W}: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: It does no good to bar the gate when the enemy is already inside.

card.name: Baldin, Century Herdmaster
card.oracle_text:
During your turn, each creature assigns combat damage equal to its toughness rather than its power.
Whenever Baldin attacks, up to one hundred target creatures each get +0/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of cards in your hand.

card.oracle_text: Choose a number between 0 and 10. Destroy all creatures with power greater than or equal to the chosen number.

card.name: Arbor Adherent
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add one mana of any color.

Defender

Defender, hexproof
